title: MaxAwe Consumer Fuse Box Unit 3 Way, IP65 63A RCD 3MCB 6A+16A+32A Waterproof Plastic Leakage Circuit Breaker, Circuit Breaker Panel Garage Consumer Unit, Protective Housing Consumer Unit Fuse Box

⚡【IP 65 Protective Cover】Consumer unit boasts an IP 65 water proofrating protection, which guaranteeing a prolonged service life. ⚡【High Quality Material】Crafted primarily made of high-quality plastic, which has high flame retardant and impact resistant. This material can guarantee exceptional durability and waterproof which is hard to break or damaging to prolonge service performance.

⚡【Versatile Application】The circuit breaker box ideal for a wide range of applications, which is suitable for most 2 way circuits. It can be widely used in garages, caravans, workshops, and outbuildings to fit your diverse electrical requirements.
